screen.cowboymkb.title: Multi Keybinds
screen.cowboymkb.how_to: Click any control's button → press a key → that key becomes its 2nd trigger.
screen.cowboymkb.press: Press a key or mouse button...  (Esc to cancel)
tooltip.cowboymkb.rebind: Click to assign a second key or mouse button to this control. Both the original key and the new one will trigger the same action.
tooltip.cowboymkb.clear: Remove this control's second key. The original key still works normally.
tooltip.cowboymkb.prev: Go to the previous page of controls.
tooltip.cowboymkb.next: Go to the next page of controls.
tooltip.cowboymkb.done: Close this menu and return to the game.
tooltip.cowboymkb.reset_all: Remove ALL second key assignments at once. This cannot be undone.
